name: ecommerce-monorepo
description: Next.js storefront (web) + Express API (server) + optional Firebase Functions

scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix web" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm ci --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.build:all: npm ci --prefix web && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix server
